KETSU_BASE_URL).replace(/\\/$/, \"\") + url;\n    return url;\n  }\n}\nfunction meta(name, doc) {\n  doc = doc || document;\n  var el = doc.querySelector('meta[property=\"' + name + '\"], meta[name=\"' + name + '\"]');\n  return attr(el, \"content\");\n}\nfunction uniquePush(list, seen, key, value) {\n  if (!key || seen[key]) return;\n  seen[key] = true;\n  list.push(value);\n}\nfunction humanizeSlug(value) {\n  value = htmlDecode(String(value || \"\"));\n  value = value.split(/[?#]/)[0].replace(/\\/+$/, \"\");\n  value = value.substring(value.lastIndexOf(\"/\") + 1);\n  value = value.replace(/\\.(html?|json)$/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/^(novel|book|manga|series|comic|comics|chapter|chapters)[-_]/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/[-_]+/g, \" \").replace(/\\b\\w/g, function (m) { return m.toUpperCase(); });\n  return cleanText(value);\n}\nfunction looksIdentifierSegment(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(String(value || \"\"));\n  return !t\n    || /^(manga|novel|book|series|comic|comics|title|chapter|chapters|read|viewer)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction titleFromLink(link) {\n  try {\n    var url = new URL(absUrl(link), KETSU_BASE_URL);\n    var param = url.searchParams.get(\"title\") || url.searchParams.get(\"page\") || url.searchParams.get(\"name\") || url.searchParams.get(\"keyword\") || url.searchParams.get(\"q\");\n    if (param) return humanizeSlug(param);\n    var bits = url.pathname.split(\"/\").filter(Boolean);\n    for (var i = bits.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n      if (!looksIdentifierSegment(bits[i])) return humanizeSlug(bits[i]);\n    }\n    return humanizeSlug(url.pathname);\n  } catch (e) {\n    return humanizeSlug(link);\n  }\n}\nfunction sourceName() {\n  var host = \"\";\n  try { host = new URL(KETSU_BASE_URL).host.toLowerCase(); } catch (e) { host = String(KETSU_BASE_URL || \"\").toLowerCase(); }\n  var map = [\n    [\"royalroad.com\", \"Royal Road\"],\n    [\"baka-tsuki.org\", \"Baka-Tsuki\"],\n    [\"novelfire.net\", \"NovelFire\"],\n    [\"novelbin.\", \"NovelBin\"],\n    [\"freewebnovel.com\", \"FreeWebNovel\"],\n    [\"readnovelfull.com\", \"ReadNovelFull\"],\n    [\"novgo.net\", \"Novgo\"],\n    [\"novelcool.com\", \"NovelCool\"],\n    [\"scribblehub.com\", \"Scribble Hub\"],\n    [\"wuxiaworld.com\", \"WuxiaWorld\"],\n    [\"mangadex.org\", \"MangaDex\"],\n    [\"asurascans.com\", \"Asura Scans\"],\n    [\"mangakatana.com\", \"MangaKatana\"],\n    [\"mangapill.com\", \"Mangapill\"],\n    [\"weebcentral.com\", \"WeebCentral\"],\n    [\"webtoons.com\", \"WEBTOON\"],\n    [\"tapas.io\", \"Tapas\"],\n    [\"archive.org\", \"Internet Archive\"],\n    [\"wikimedia.org\", \"Wikimedia Commons\"],\n    [\"anilibria.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"aniliberty.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"pluto.tv\", \"Pluto TV\"],\n    [\"dailymotion.com\", \"Dailymotion\"],\n    [\"peertube.\", \"PeerTube\"]\n  ];\n  for (var i = 0; i < map.length; i++) if (host.indexOf(map[i][0]) >= 0) return map[i][1];\n  return \"Source\";\n}\nfunction looksGenericTitle(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  if (!t) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^(chapter|ch\\.?|episode|ep\\.?|page)\\s*[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  return /^(untitled|series|manga|novel|book|comic|title)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(scribble hub series|mangapill manga|novelfire|novelbin|freewebnovel|readnovelfull|novgo|novelcool|webtoon)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(royal road|baka-tsuki|mangadex|weebcentral|mangakatana|asura scans)$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction cleanPageTitle(value, link) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  var fallback = titleFromLink(link);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle) && fallback) cleanTitle = fallback;\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+\\|\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+-\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanText(cleanTitle);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle)) cleanTitle = \"\";\n  return cleanTitle || (fallback && !looksGenericTitle(fallback) ? fallback : \"\") || \"Untitled\";\n}\nfunction chapterTitleFromLink(link, fallback) {\n  var raw = cleanText(fallback || \"\");\n  var slug = titleFromLink(link);\n  var source = raw || slug;\n  var m = source.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (!m && slug) m = slug.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (m) {\n    var rest = cleanText((m[2] || \"\").replace(/^[-:.\\s]+/, \"\"));\n    rest = rest.replace(/\\s+(Mangapill|NovelFire|Chapter)$/i, \"\");\n    return \"Chapter \" + m[1] + (rest && rest.length <= 70 ? \": \" + rest : \"\");\n  }\n  return raw || slug || \"Chapter\";\n}\nfunction pageData(link, image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanPageTitle(title, link);\n  return new Data(request(absUrl(image)), cleanTitle, description || \"\", sourceName(), \"\", \"\", \"\", false, request(absUrl(link)), false);\n}\nfunction emitPage(kind, data, sectionName) {\n  var output = [new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", false), defaultLayout(), data)];\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(\"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitPageAppend(kind, data, sectionName, nextUrl) {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  var output = state.output || [];\n  if (output.length === 1) {\n    var first = output[0] || {};\n    var firstSection = first.section || {};\n    var firstData = first.data && first.data.length ? first.data[0] : null;\n    var firstLink = firstData && firstData.link ? firstData.link.url : \"\";\n    if (!firstSection.sectionName && firstData && !firstData.title && !firstLink) output = [];\n  }\n  output.push(new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", true), defaultLayout(), data));\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitInfo(output, nextUrl, extraInfo) { finish(new Info(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(extraInfo), noJs(), output)); }\nfunction emitImages(images) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, images, null))); }\nfunction emitRawVideos(rawVideos, needsResolver) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(new Videos(needsResolver || [], rawVideos || []), null, null))); }\nfunction emitTextChapter(value) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, null, new Text(cleanText(value))))); }\nfunction removeJunk(root) {\n  if (!root) return;\n  var junk = root.querySelectorAll(\"script, style, iframe, ins, .ads, .ad, .advertisement, .nf-ads, nav, form\");\n  for (var i = 0; i < junk.length; i++) junk[i].remove();\n}\n\nfunction wwUtf8Bytes(value) {\n  var s = unescape(encodeURIComponent(String(value || \"\")));\n  var out = [];\n  for (var i = 0; i < s.length; i++) out.push(s.charCodeAt(i) & 255);\n  return out;\n}\nfunction wwVarint(value) {\n  var n = Number(value || 0);\n  if (n < 0) n = 0;\n  var out = [];\n  while (n > 127) {\n    out.push((n & 127) | 128);\n    n = Math.floor(n / 128);\n  }\n  out.push(n);\n  return out;\n}\nfunction wwConcat(a, b) {\n  for (var i = 0; i < b.length; i++) a.push(b[i]);\n  return a;\n}\nfunction wwVarField(no, value) {\n  var out = wwVarint(no * 8);\n  return wwConcat(out, wwVarint(value));\n}\nfunction wwStringField(no, value) {\n  var bytes = wwUtf8Bytes(value);\n  var out = wwVarint(no * 8 + 2);\n  wwConcat(out, wwVarint(bytes.length));\n  return wwConcat(out, bytes);\n}\nfunction wwMessageField(no, bytes) {\n  var out = wwVarint(no * 8 + 2);\n  wwConcat(out, wwVarint(bytes.length));\n  return wwConcat(out, bytes);\n}\nfunction wwFrame(bytes) {\n  var len = bytes.length;\n  var framed = [0, (len >> 24) & 255, (len >> 16) & 255, (len >> 8) & 255, len & 255];\n  wwConcat(framed, bytes);\n  var s = \"\";\n  for (var i = 0; i < framed.length; i++) s += String.fromCharCode(framed[i]);\n  return btoa(s);\n}\nfunction wwGrpcHeaders() {\n  return headers([\n    new KeyValue(\"Content-Type\", \"application/grpc-web-text+proto\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Accept\", \"application/grpc-web-text\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Origin\", \"https://www.wuxiaworld.com\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"x-grpc-web\", \"1\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"client-version\", \"2.11.01-c17e9a86\")\n  ]);\n}\nfunction wwSearchBody(title, sortType) {\n  var inner = wwStringField(1, title);\n  var msg = [];\n  wwConcat(msg, wwMessageField(1, inner));\n  if (sortType) wwConcat(msg, wwVarField(4, sortType));\n  if (sortType) wwConcat(msg, wwVarField(5, 1));\n  wwConcat(msg, wwVarField(7, 20));\n  return wwFrame(msg);\n}\nfunction wwChapterListBody(novelId) {\n  var msg = wwVarField(1, novelId);\n  wwConcat(msg, wwMessageField(3, wwVarField(1, 1000)));\n  return wwFrame(msg);\n}\nfunction wwReadVar(bin, ref) {\n  var shift = 0;\n  var result = 0;\n  var b = 0;\n  do {\n    b = bin.charCodeAt(ref.i++) & 255;\n    result += (b & 127) * Math.pow(2, shift);\n    shift += 7;\n  } while (b >= 128 && ref.i < bin.length);\n  return result;\n}\nfunction wwUtf8(bin) {\n  try { return decodeURIComponent(escape(bin)); } catch (e) { return bin; }\n}\nfunction wwFields(bin) {\n  var fields = [];\n  var ref = { i: 0 };\n  while (ref.i < bin.length) {\n    var tag = wwReadVar(bin, ref);\n    if (!tag) break;\n    var no = Math.floor(tag / 8);\n    var wt = tag % 8;\n    var value = null;\n    var bytes = \"\";\n    if (wt === 0) {\n      value = wwReadVar(bin, ref);\n    } else if (wt === 2) {\n      var len = wwReadVar(bin, ref);\n      bytes = bin.slice(ref.i, ref.i + len);\n      value = wwUtf8(bytes);\n      ref.i += len;\n    } else if (wt === 5) {\n      ref.i += 4;\n    } else if (wt === 1) {\n      ref.i += 8;\n    } else {\n      break;\n    }\n    fields.push({ no: no, wt: wt, value: value, bytes: bytes });\n  }\n  return fields;\n}\nfunction wwField(fields, no) {\n  for (var i = 0; i < fields.length; i++) if (fields[i].no === no) return fields[i];\n  return null;\n}\nfunction wwFieldValue(fields, no) {\n  var f = wwField(fields, no);\n  return f ? f.value : \"\";\n}\nfunction wwDecodeGrpcText(textValue) {\n  var txt = cleanText(textValue || readPayload()).replace(/\\s+/g, \"\");\n  var bin = \"\";\n  try {\n    bin = atob(txt);\n  } catch (e) {\n    var chunk = \"\";\n    for (var c = 0; c < txt.length; c++) {\n      chunk += txt.charAt(c);\n      if (txt.charAt(c) === \"=\") {\n        while (c + 1 < txt.length && txt.charAt(c + 1) === \"=\") {\n          c++;\n          chunk += txt.charAt(c);\n        }\n        try { bin += atob(chunk); } catch (err) {}\n        chunk = \"\";\n      }\n    }\n    if (chunk) {\n      try { bin += atob(chunk); } catch (err2) {}\n    }\n  }\n  var pos = 0;\n  while (pos + 5 <= bin.length) {\n    var flag = bin.charCodeAt(pos) & 255;\n    var len = ((bin.charCodeAt(pos + 1) & 255) * 16777216) + ((bin.charCodeAt(pos + 2) & 255) * 65536) + ((bin.charCodeAt(pos + 3) & 255) * 256) + (bin.charCodeAt(pos + 4) & 255);\n    var msg = bin.slice(pos + 5, pos + 5 + len);\n    if (flag === 0) return msg;\n    pos += 5 + len;\n  }\n  return \"\";\n}\nfunction wwStringWrapper(bytes) {\n  var fields = wwFields(bytes || \"\");\n  return wwFieldValue(fields, 1) || wwUtf8(bytes || \"\");\n}\nfunction wwExtractReactState() {\n  var html = document.documentElement.innerHTML;\n  var marker = \"window.__REACT_QUERY_STATE__ = \";\n  var start = html.indexOf(marker);\n  if (start < 0) return null;\n  var i = start + marker.length;\n  while (i < html.length && /\\s/.test(html.charAt(i))) i++;\n  var begin = i;\n  var depth = 0;\n  var inString = false;\n  var escapeNext = false;\n  for (; i < html.length; i++) {\n    var ch = html.charAt(i);\n    if (inString) {\n      if (escapeNext) escapeNext = false;\n      else if (ch === \"\\\\\") escapeNext = true;\n      else if (ch === \"\\\"\") inString = false;\n    } else if (ch === \"\\\"\") {\n      inString = true;\n    } else if (ch === \"{\") {\n      depth++;\n    } else if (ch === \"}\") {\n      depth--;\n      if (depth === 0) {\n        try { return JSON.parse(html.slice(begin, i + 1)); } catch (e) { return null; }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  return null;\n}\nfunction wwNovelFromEntry(entry) {\n  if (!entry) return null;\n  if (entry.name && entry.slug) return entry;\n  if (entry.item && entry.item.oneofKind === \"novel\") return entry.item.novel;\n  if (entry.novel) return entry.novel;\n  if (entry.series && entry.series.item) {\n    if (entry.series.item.oneofKind === \"novel\") return entry.series.item.novel;\n    return entry.series.item;\n  }\n  if (entry.innerEntry && entry.innerEntry.card && entry.series) return wwNovelFromEntry(entry.series);\n  return null;\n}\nfunction wwPageDataForNovel(novel) {\n  var title = novel.name || \"WuxiaWorld Novel\";\n  var slug = novel.slug || \"\";\n  var link = \"https://www.wuxiaworld.com/novel/\" + slug;\n  var cover = novel.coverUrl && novel.coverUrl.value ? novel.coverUrl.value : \"\";\n  var synopsis = novel.synopsis && novel.synopsis.value ? stripTags(novel.synopsis.value) : \"\";\n  var genres = novel.genres && novel.genres.length ? novel.genres.join(\", \") : (novel.language && novel.language.value ? novel.language.value : \"WuxiaWorld\");\n  var author = novel.authorName && novel.authorName.value ? novel.authorName.value : (novel.translatorName && novel.translatorName.value ? novel.translatorName.value : \"WuxiaWorld\");\n  var count = novel.chapterInfo && novel.chapterInfo.chapterCount && novel.chapterInfo.chapterCount.value ? (\"Chapters: \" + novel.chapterInfo.chapterCount.value) : \"\";\n  return pageData(link, cover, title, synopsis, genres, author, \"Text\", count);\n}\n\nvar state = wwExtractReactState();\nvar queries = state && state.queries ? state.queries : [];\nvar novel = null;\nfor (var q = 0; q < queries.length; q++) {\n  if (queries[q].queryKey && queries[q].queryKey[0] === \"novel\") {\n    novel = queries[q].state && queries[q].state.data ? queries[q].state.data.item : null;\n  }\n}\nif (!novel) novel = {};\nvar title = novel.name || meta(\"og:title\") || text(document.querySelector(\"h1\")) || \"WuxiaWorld\";\ntitle = title.replace(/\\s*\\|\\s*Wuxiaworld.*/i, \"\");\nvar slug = novel.slug || (currentUrl().match(/\\/novel\\/([^\\/?#]+)/) || [\"\", \"\"])[1];\nvar cover = novel.coverUrl && novel.coverUrl.value ? novel.coverUrl.value : meta(\"og:image\");\nvar desc = novel.synopsis && novel.synopsis.value ? stripTags(novel.synopsis.value) : (novel.description && novel.description.value ? stripTags(novel.description.value) : meta(\"description\"));\nvar genres = novel.genres || [];\nvar author = novel.authorName && novel.authorName.value ? novel.authorName.value : (novel.translator && novel.translator.userName ? novel.translator.userName : \"WuxiaWorld\");\nvar total = novel.chapterInfo && novel.chapterInfo.chapterCount && novel.chapterInfo.chapterCount.value ? novel.chapterInfo.chapterCount.value : 0;\nvar chapters = [];\nif (novel.chapterInfo && novel.chapterInfo.firstChapter && novel.chapterInfo.firstChapter.slug) {\n  chapters.push(new Chapter(novel.chapterInfo.firstChapter.name || \"First Chapter\", request(\"https://www.wuxiaworld.com/novel/\" + slug + \"/\" + novel.chapterInfo.firstChapter.slug), false));\n}\nvar output = new InfoOutput(request(cover), request(\"https://www.wuxiaworld.com/novel/\" + slug), title, desc, genres, author, \"WuxiaWorld\", \"Text\", \"Loading chapters\", chapters);\nvar next = novel.id ? \"https://api2.wuxiaworld.com/wuxiaworld.api.v2.Chapters/GetChapterList\" : \"\";\nvar req = request(next, next ? \"post\" : \"get\", next ? wwGrpcHeaders() : headers(), next ? wwChapterListBody(novel.id) : null);\nfinish(new Info(req, emptyExtra([new KeyValue(\"wuxiaWorldSlug\", slug), new KeyValue(\"wuxiaWorldTotal\", String(total))]), noJs(), output));\n"},"output":{"image":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null},"link":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null},"title":"","description":"","genres":[""],"field1":"","field2":"","field3":"","field4":"","chapters":[{"chapName":"","openInWebView":false,"link":{"url":"empty","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null}}]},"separator":""},{"request":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"User-Agent","value":"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) ZetsuKetsuModulePack/2026"}],"httpBody":null},"extra":{"commands":[{"commandName":"","params":[{"key":"","value":""}]}],"extraInfo":[{"key":"","value":""}]},"javascriptConfig":{"removeJavascript":true,"loadInWebView":false,"javaScript":"var KETSU_BASE_URL = \"https://www.wuxiaworld.com\";\nvar USER_AGENT = \"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) ZetsuKetsuModulePack/2026\";\n\nfunction KeyValue(key, value) { this.key = key; this.value = value; }\nfunction ModuleRequest(url, method, headers, httpBody) { this.url = url; this.method = method; this.headers = headers; this.httpBody = httpBody; }\nfunction Extra(commands, extraInfo) { this.commands = commands; this.extraInfo = extraInfo; }\nfunction Commands(commandName, params) { this.commandName = commandName; this.params = params; }\nfunction JavascriptConfig(removeJavascript, loadInWebView, javaScript) { this.removeJavascript = removeJavascript; this.loadInWebView = loadInWebView; this.javaScript = javaScript; }\nfunction MainPage(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Search(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Info(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Chapters(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction PageOutput(cellDesing, orientation, defaultLayout, paging, section, layout, data) { this.cellDesing = cellDesing; this.orientation = orientation; this.defaultLayout = defaultLayout; this.paging = paging; this.section = section; this.layout = layout; this.data = data; }\nfunction Section(sectionName, separator) { this.sectionName = sectionName; this.separator = separator; }\nfunction Layout(insets, visibleCellsWidthS, visibleCellsWidthM, visibleCellsWidthL, visibleCellsHeight, heightForVisibleCells, cellSize, ratio, constant, horizontalSpacing, verticalSpacing) { this.insets = insets; this.visibleCellsWidthS = visibleCellsWidthS; this.visibleCellsWidthM = visibleCellsWidthM; this.visibleCellsWidthL = visibleCellsWidthL; this.visibleCellsHeight = visibleCellsHeight; this.heightForVisibleCells = heightForVisibleCells; this.cellSize = cellSize; this.ratio = ratio; this.constant = constant; this.horizontalSpacing = horizontalSpacing; this.verticalSpacing = verticalSpacing; }\nfunction Insets(top, bottom, left, right) { this.top = top; this.bottom = bottom; this.left = left; this.right = right; }\nfunction Size(width, height) { this.width = width; this.height = height; }\nfunction Ratio(inRelation, number1, number2) { this.inRelation = inRelation; this.number1 = number1; this.number2 = number2; }\nfunction Data(image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4, isChapter, link, openInWebView) { this.image = image; this.title = title; this.description = description; this.field1 = field1; this.field2 = field2; this.field3 = field3; this.field4 = field4; this.isChapter = isChapter; this.link = link; this.openInWebView = openInWebView; }\nfunction InfoOutput(image, link, title, description, genres, field1, field2, field3, field4, chapters) { this.image = image; this.link = link; this.title = title; this.description = description; this.genres = genres; this.field1 = field1; this.field2 = field2; this.field3 = field3; this.field4 = field4; this.chapters = chapters; }\nfunction Chapter(chapName, link, openInWebView) { this.chapName = chapName; this.link = link; this.openInWebView = openInWebView; }\nfunction ChapterOutput(videos, images, text) { this.videos = videos; this.images = images; this.text = text; }\nfunction Videos(needsResolver, rawVideo) { this.needsResolver = needsResolver; this.rawVideo = rawVideo; }\nfunction NeedsResolver(resolverIdentifier, link) { this.resolverIdentifier = resolverIdentifier; this.link = link; }\nfunction RawVideo(video) { this.video = video; }\nfunction Video(videoQuality, videoLink) { this.videoQuality = videoQuality; this.videoLink = videoLink; }\nfunction Text(text) { this.text = text; }\n\nfunction headers(extra) {\n  var list = [new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT)];\n  if (KETSU_BASE_URL) list.push(new KeyValue(\"Referer\", KETSU_BASE_URL));\n  if (extra) for (var i = 0; i < extra.length; i++) list.push(extra[i]);\n  return list;\n}\nfunction request(url, method, headerList, body) { return new ModuleRequest(url || \"\", method || \"get\", headerList || headers(), body || null); }\nfunction emptyExtra(extraInfo) { return new Extra([new Commands(\"\", [new KeyValue(\"\", \"\")])], extraInfo || [new KeyValue(\"\", \"\")]); }\nfunction noJs() { return new JavascriptConfig(false, false, \"\"); }\nfunction defaultLayout() { return new Layout(new Insets(8, 8, 8, 8), 2, 2, 3, 1, 540, new Size(300, 540), new Ratio(\"width\", 2, 3), new Size(1, 2), 10, 12); }\nfunction getSaved() {\n  var savedData = document.getElementById(\"ketsu-final-data\");\n  try { return JSON.parse(savedData.innerHTML || savedData.innerText || \"{}\"); } catch (e) { return {}; }\n}\nfunction safeJson(value) {\n  return JSON.stringify(value).replace(/&/g, \"\\\\u0026\").replace(/</g, \"\\\\u003c\").replace(/>/g, \"\\\\u003e\");\n}\nfunction finish(obj) {\n  var savedData = document.getElementById(\"ketsu-final-data\");\n  savedData.innerHTML = safeJson(obj);\n}\nfunction currentUrl() {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  if (state && state.request && state.request.url) return state.request.url;\n  try { return window.location.href; } catch (e) { return KETSU_BASE_URL; }\n}\nfunction readPayload() {\n  var script = document.querySelector(\"script\");\n  var txt = \"\";\n  if (script && script.textContent) {\n    var candidate = script.textContent.trim();\n    if (candidate.indexOf(\"{\") === 0 || candidate.indexOf(\"[\") === 0 || candidate.indexOf(\"/*\") === 0) txt = candidate;\n  }\n  if (!txt && document.body) txt = (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent || \"\").trim();\n  if (txt.indexOf(\"/*\") === 0) txt = txt.slice(2);\n  if (txt.lastIndexOf(\"*/\") === txt.length - 2) txt = txt.slice(0, -2);\n  return txt.trim();\n}\nfunction parseJsonPayload() { return JSON.parse(readPayload()); }\nfunction docFromHtml(html) { return new DOMParser().parseFromString(html || \"\", \"text/html\"); }\nfunction attr(el, name) { return el ? (el.getAttribute(name) || \"\") : \"\"; }\nfunction text(el) { return cleanText(el ? (el.innerText || el.textContent || \"\") : \"\"); }\nfunction cleanText(value) {\n  return String(value || \"\")\n    .replace(/\\r/g, \"\")\n    .replace(/\\u00a0/g, \" \")\n    .replace(/[ \\t]+\\n/g, \"\\n\")\n    .replace(/\\n[ \\t]+/g, \"\\n\")\n    .replace(/[ \\t]{2,}/g, \" \")\n    .replace(/\\n{3,}/g, \"\\n\\n\")\n    .trim();\n}\nfunction htmlDecode(value) {\n  var ta = document.createElement(\"textarea\");\n  ta.innerHTML = String(value || \"\");\n  return ta.value;\n}\nfunction stripTags(value) {\n  var div = document.createElement(\"div\");\n  div.innerHTML = String(value || \"\");\n  return cleanText(div.textContent || div.innerText || \"\");\n}\nfunction absUrl(url, base) {\n  if (!url) return \"\";\n  try { return new URL(htmlDecode(url), base || currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL).href; }\n  catch (e) {\n    if (String(url).indexOf(\"//\") === 0) return \"https:\" + url;\n    if (String(url).charAt(0) === \"/\") return (base || KETSU_BASE_URL).replace(/\\/$/, \"\") + url;\n    return url;\n  }\n}\nfunction meta(name, doc) {\n  doc = doc || document;\n  var el = doc.querySelector('meta[property=\"' + name + '\"], meta[name=\"' + name + '\"]');\n  return attr(el, \"content\");\n}\nfunction uniquePush(list, seen, key, value) {\n  if (!key || seen[key]) return;\n  seen[key] = true;\n  list.push(value);\n}\nfunction humanizeSlug(value) {\n  value = htmlDecode(String(value || \"\"));\n  value = value.split(/[?#]/)[0].replace(/\\/+$/, \"\");\n  value = value.substring(value.lastIndexOf(\"/\") + 1);\n  value = value.replace(/\\.(html?|json)$/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/^(novel|book|manga|series|comic|comics|chapter|chapters)[-_]/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/[-_]+/g, \" \").replace(/\\b\\w/g, function (m) { return m.toUpperCase(); });\n  return cleanText(value);\n}\nfunction looksIdentifierSegment(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(String(value || \"\"));\n  return !t\n    || /^(manga|novel|book|series|comic|comics|title|chapter|chapters|read|viewer)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction titleFromLink(link) {\n  try {\n    var url = new URL(absUrl(link), KETSU_BASE_URL);\n    var param = url.searchParams.get(\"title\") || url.searchParams.get(\"page\") || url.searchParams.get(\"name\") || url.searchParams.get(\"keyword\") || url.searchParams.get(\"q\");\n    if (param) return humanizeSlug(param);\n    var bits = url.pathname.split(\"/\").filter(Boolean);\n    for (var i = bits.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n      if (!looksIdentifierSegment(bits[i])) return humanizeSlug(bits[i]);\n    }\n    return humanizeSlug(url.pathname);\n  } catch (e) {\n    return humanizeSlug(link);\n  }\n}\nfunction sourceName() {\n  var host = \"\";\n  try { host = new URL(KETSU_BASE_URL).host.toLowerCase(); } catch (e) { host = String(KETSU_BASE_URL || \"\").toLowerCase(); }\n  var map = [\n    [\"royalroad.com\", \"Royal Road\"],\n    [\"baka-tsuki.org\", \"Baka-Tsuki\"],\n    [\"novelfire.net\", \"NovelFire\"],\n    [\"novelbin.\", \"NovelBin\"],\n    [\"freewebnovel.com\", \"FreeWebNovel\"],\n    [\"readnovelfull.com\", \"ReadNovelFull\"],\n    [\"novgo.net\", \"Novgo\"],\n    [\"novelcool.com\", \"NovelCool\"],\n    [\"scribblehub.com\", \"Scribble Hub\"],\n    [\"wuxiaworld.com\", \"WuxiaWorld\"],\n    [\"mangadex.org\", \"MangaDex\"],\n    [\"asurascans.com\", \"Asura Scans\"],\n    [\"mangakatana.com\", \"MangaKatana\"],\n    [\"mangapill.com\", \"Mangapill\"],\n    [\"weebcentral.com\", \"WeebCentral\"],\n    [\"webtoons.com\", \"WEBTOON\"],\n    [\"tapas.io\", \"Tapas\"],\n    [\"archive.org\", \"Internet Archive\"],\n    [\"wikimedia.org\", \"Wikimedia Commons\"],\n    [\"anilibria.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"aniliberty.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"pluto.tv\", \"Pluto TV\"],\n    [\"dailymotion.com\", \"Dailymotion\"],\n    [\"peertube.\", \"PeerTube\"]\n  ];\n  for (var i = 0; i < map.length; i++) if (host.indexOf(map[i][0]) >= 0) return map[i][1];\n  return \"Source\";\n}\nfunction looksGenericTitle(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  if (!t) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^(chapter|ch\\.?|episode|ep\\.?|page)\\s*[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  return /^(untitled|series|manga|novel|book|comic|title)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(scribble hub series|mangapill manga|novelfire|novelbin|freewebnovel|readnovelfull|novgo|novelcool|webtoon)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(royal road|baka-tsuki|mangadex|weebcentral|mangakatana|asura scans)$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction cleanPageTitle(value, link) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  var fallback = titleFromLink(link);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle) && fallback) cleanTitle = fallback;\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+\\|\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+-\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanText(cleanTitle);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle)) cleanTitle = \"\";\n  return cleanTitle || (fallback && !looksGenericTitle(fallback) ? fallback : \"\") || \"Untitled\";\n}\nfunction chapterTitleFromLink(link, fallback) {\n  var raw = cleanText(fallback || \"\");\n  var slug = titleFromLink(link);\n  var source = raw || slug;\n  var m = source.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (!m && slug) m = slug.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (m) {\n    var rest = cleanText((m[2] || \"\").replace(/^[-:.\\s]+/, \"\"));\n    rest = rest.replace(/\\s+(Mangapill|NovelFire|Chapter)$/i, \"\");\n    return \"Chapter \" + m[1] + (rest && rest.length <= 70 ? \": \" + rest : \"\");\n  }\n  return raw || slug || \"Chapter\";\n}\nfunction pageData(link, image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanPageTitle(title, link);\n  return new Data(request(absUrl(image)), cleanTitle, description || \"\", sourceName(), \"\", \"\", \"\", false, request(absUrl(link)), false);\n}\nfunction emitPage(kind, data, sectionName) {\n  var output = [new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", false), defaultLayout(), data)];\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(\"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitPageAppend(kind, data, sectionName, nextUrl) {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  var output = state.output || [];\n  if (output.length === 1) {\n    var first = output[0] || {};\n    var firstSection = first.section || {};\n    var firstData = first.data && first.data.length ? first.data[0] : null;\n    var firstLink = firstData && firstData.link ? firstData.link.url : \"\";\n    if (!firstSection.sectionName && firstData && !firstData.title && !firstLink) output = [];\n  }\n  output.push(new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", true), defaultLayout(), data));\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitInfo(output, nextUrl, extraInfo) { finish(new Info(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(extraInfo), noJs(), output)); }\nfunction emitImages(images) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, images, null))); }\nfunction emitRawVideos(rawVideos, needsResolver) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(new Videos(needsResolver || [], rawVideos || []), null, null))); }\nfunction emitTextChapter(value) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, null, new Text(cleanText(value))))); }\nfunction removeJunk(root) {\n  if (!root) return;\n  var junk = root.querySelectorAll(\"script, style, iframe, ins, .ads, .ad, .advertisement, .nf-ads, nav, form\");\n  for (var i = 0; i < junk.length; i++) junk[i].remove();\n}\n\nfunction wwUtf8Bytes(value) {\n  var s = unescape(encodeURIComponent(String(value || \"\")));\n  var out = [];\n  for (var i = 0; i < s.length; i++) out.push(s.charCodeAt(i) & 255);\n  return out;\n}\nfunction wwVarint(value) {\n  var n = Number(value || 0);\n  if (n < 0) n = 0;\n  var out = [];\n  while (n > 127) {\n    out.push((n & 127) | 128);\n    n = Math.floor(n / 128);\n  }\n  out.push(n);\n  return out;\n}\nfunction wwConcat(a, b) {\n  for (var i = 0; i < b.length; i++) a.push(b[i]);\n  return a;\n}\nfunction wwVarField(no, value) {\n  var out = wwVarint(no * 8);\n  return wwConcat(out, wwVarint(value));\n}\nfunction wwStringField(no, value) {\n  var bytes = wwUtf8Bytes(value);\n  var out = wwVarint(no * 8 + 2);\n  wwConcat(out, wwVarint(bytes.length));\n  return wwConcat(out, bytes);\n}\nfunction wwMessageField(no, bytes) {\n  var out = wwVarint(no * 8 + 2);\n  wwConcat(out, wwVarint(bytes.length));\n  return wwConcat(out, bytes);\n}\nfunction wwFrame(bytes) {\n  var len = bytes.length;\n  var framed = [0, (len >> 24) & 255, (len >> 16) & 255, (len >> 8) & 255, len & 255];\n  wwConcat(framed, bytes);\n  var s = \"\";\n  for (var i = 0; i < framed.length; i++) s += String.fromCharCode(framed[i]);\n  return btoa(s);\n}\nfunction wwGrpcHeaders() {\n  return headers([\n    new KeyValue(\"Content-Type\", \"application/grpc-web-text+proto\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Accept\", \"application/grpc-web-text\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Origin\", \"https://www.wuxiaworld.com\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"x-grpc-web\", \"1\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"client-version\", \"2.11.01-c17e9a86\")\n  ]);\n}\nfunction wwSearchBody(title, sortType) {\n  var inner = wwStringField(1, title);\n  var msg = [];\n  wwConcat(msg, wwMessageField(1, inner));\n  if (sortType) wwConcat(msg, wwVarField(4, sortType));\n  if (sortType) wwConcat(msg, wwVarField(5, 1));\n  wwConcat(msg, wwVarField(7, 20));\n  return wwFrame(msg);\n}\nfunction wwChapterListBody(novelId) {\n  var msg = wwVarField(1, novelId);\n  wwConcat(msg, wwMessageField(3, wwVarField(1, 1000)));\n  return wwFrame(msg);\n}\nfunction wwReadVar(bin, ref) {\n  var shift = 0;\n  var result = 0;\n  var b = 0;\n  do {\n    b = bin.charCodeAt(ref.i++) & 255;\n    result += (b & 127) * Math.pow(2, shift);\n    shift += 7;\n  } while (b >= 128 && ref.i < bin.length);\n  return result;\n}\nfunction wwUtf8(bin) {\n  try { return decodeURIComponent(escape(bin)); } catch (e) { return bin; }\n}\nfunction wwFields(bin) {\n  var fields = [];\n  var ref = { i: 0 };\n  while (ref.i < bin.length) {\n    var tag = wwReadVar(bin, ref);\n    if (!tag) break;\n    var no = Math.floor(tag / 8);\n    var wt = tag % 8;\n    var value = null;\n    var bytes = \"\";\n    if (wt === 0) {\n      value = wwReadVar(bin, ref);\n    } else if (wt === 2) {\n      var len = wwReadVar(bin, ref);\n      bytes = bin.slice(ref.i, ref.i + len);\n      value = wwUtf8(bytes);\n      ref.i += len;\n    } else if (wt === 5) {\n      ref.i += 4;\n    } else if (wt === 1) {\n      ref.i += 8;\n    } else {\n      break;\n    }\n    fields.push({ no: no, wt: wt, value: value, bytes: bytes });\n  }\n  return fields;\n}\nfunction wwField(fields, no) {\n  for (var i = 0; i < fields.length; i++) if (fields[i].no === no) return fields[i];\n  return null;\n}\nfunction wwFieldValue(fields, no) {\n  var f = wwField(fields, no);\n  return f ? f.value : \"\";\n}\nfunction wwDecodeGrpcText(textValue) {\n  var txt = cleanText(textValue || readPayload()).replace(/\\s+/g, \"\");\n  var bin = \"\";\n  try {\n    bin = atob(txt);\n  } catch (e) {\n    var chunk = \"\";\n    for (var c = 0; c < txt.length; c++) {\n      chunk += txt.charAt(c);\n      if (txt.charAt(c) === \"=\") {\n        while (c + 1 < txt.length && txt.charAt(c + 1) === \"=\") {\n          c++;\n          chunk += txt.charAt(c);\n        }\n        try { bin += atob(chunk); } catch (err) {}\n        chunk = \"\";\n      }\n    }\n    if (chunk) {\n      try { bin += atob(chunk); } catch (err2) {}\n    }\n  }\n  var pos = 0;\n  while (pos + 5 <= bin.length) {\n    var flag = bin.charCodeAt(pos) & 255;\n    var len = ((bin.charCodeAt(pos + 1) & 255) * 16777216) + ((bin.charCodeAt(pos + 2) & 255) * 65536) + ((bin.charCodeAt(pos + 3) & 255) * 256) + (bin.charCodeAt(pos + 4) & 255);\n    var msg = bin.slice(pos + 5, pos + 5 + len);\n    if (flag === 0) return msg;\n    pos += 5 + len;\n  }\n  return \"\";\n}\nfunction wwStringWrapper(bytes) {\n  var fields = wwFields(bytes || \"\");\n  return wwFieldValue(fields, 1) || wwUtf8(bytes || \"\");\n}\nfunction wwExtractReactState() {\n  var html = document.documentElement.innerHTML;\n  var marker = \"window.__REACT_QUERY_STATE__ = \";\n  var start = html.indexOf(marker);\n  if (start < 0) return null;\n  var i = start + marker.length;\n  while (i < html.length && /\\s/.test(html.charAt(i))) i++;\n  var begin = i;\n  var depth = 0;\n  var inString = false;\n  var escapeNext = false;\n  for (; i < html.length; i++) {\n    var ch = html.charAt(i);\n    if (inString) {\n      if (escapeNext) escapeNext = false;\n      else if (ch === \"\\\\\") escapeNext = true;\n      else if (ch === \"\\\"\") inString = false;\n    } else if (ch === \"\\\"\") {\n      inString = true;\n    } else if (ch === \"{\") {\n      depth++;\n    } else if (ch === \"}\") {\n      depth--;\n      if (depth === 0) {\n        try { return JSON.parse(html.slice(begin, i + 1)); } catch (e) { return null; }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  return null;\n}\nfunction wwNovelFromEntry(entry) {\n  if (!entry) return null;\n  if (entry.name && entry.slug) return entry;\n  if (entry.item && entry.item.oneofKind === \"novel\") return entry.item.novel;\n  if (entry.novel) return entry.novel;\n  if (entry.series && entry.series.item) {\n    if (entry.series.item.oneofKind === \"novel\") return entry.series.item.novel;\n    return entry.series.item;\n  }\n  if (entry.innerEntry && entry.innerEntry.card && entry.series) return wwNovelFromEntry(entry.series);\n  return null;\n}\nfunction wwPageDataForNovel(novel) {\n  var title = novel.name || \"WuxiaWorld Novel\";\n  var slug = novel.slug || \"\";\n  var link = \"https://www.wuxiaworld.com/novel/\" + slug;\n  var cover = novel.coverUrl && novel.coverUrl.value ? novel.coverUrl.value : \"\";\n  var synopsis = novel.synopsis && novel.synopsis.value ? stripTags(novel.synopsis.value) : \"\";\n  var genres = novel.genres && novel.genres.length ? novel.genres.join(\", \") : (novel.language && novel.language.value ? novel.language.value : \"WuxiaWorld\");\n  var author = novel.authorName && novel.authorName.value ? novel.authorName.value : (novel.translatorName && novel.translatorName.value ? novel.translatorName.value : \"WuxiaWorld\");\n  var count = novel.chapterInfo && novel.chapterInfo.chapterCount && novel.chapterInfo.chapterCount.value ? (\"Chapters: \" + novel.chapterInfo.chapterCount.value) : \"\";\n  return pageData(link, cover, title, synopsis, genres, author, \"Text\", count);\n}\n\nvar state = getSaved();\nvar output = state.output || new InfoOutput(request(\"\"), request(\"\"), \"WuxiaWorld\", \"\", [], \"\", \"WuxiaWorld\", \"Text\", \"\", []);\nvar slug = \"\";\nvar extraList = state && state.extra && state.extra.extraInfo ? state.extra.extraInfo : [];\nfor (var e = 0; e < extraList.length; e++) if (extraList[e].key === \"wuxiaWorldSlug\") slug = extraList[e].value;\nif (!slug && output.link && output.link.url) {\n  var match = output.link.url.match(/\\/novel\\/([^\\/?#]+)/);\n  if (match && match[1]) slug = match[1];\n}\nvar msg = wwDecodeGrpcText();\nvar fields = wwFields(msg);\nvar chapters = [];\nvar seen = {};\nfor (var i = 0; i < fields.length; i++) {\n  if (fields[i].no !== 1 || !fields[i].bytes) continue;\n  var groupFields = wwFields(fields[i].bytes);\n  var groupTitle = wwFieldValue(groupFields, 2);\n  for (var g = 0; g < groupFields.length; g++) {\n    if (groupFields[g].no !== 6 || !groupFields[g].bytes) continue;\n    var chFields = wwFields(groupFields[g].bytes);\n    var name = wwFieldValue(chFields, 2);\n    var chSlug = wwFieldValue(chFields, 3);\n    if (chSlug) {\n      var label = groupTitle && name.indexOf(groupTitle) < 0 ? groupTitle + \" - \" + name : name;\n      var link = \"https://www.wuxiaworld.com/novel/\" + slug + \"/\" + chSlug;\n      uniquePush(chapters, seen, link, new Chapter(label || chSlug, request(link), false));\n    }\n  }\n}\noutput.chapters = chapters.length ? chapters : (output.chapters || []);\noutput.field4 = \"Chapters: \" + output.chapters.length;\nemitInfo(output, \"\");\n"},"output":{"image":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null},"link":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null},"title":"","description":"","genres":[""],"field1":"","field2":"","field3":"","field4":"","chapters":[{"chapName":"","openInWebView":false,"link":{"url":"empty","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null}}]},"separator":""}],"chapters":[{"request":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"User-Agent","value":"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"}],"httpBody":null},"extra":{"commands":[{"commandName":"","params":[{"key":"","value":""}]}],"extraInfo":[{"key":"","value":""}]},"javascriptConfig":{"removeJavascript":false,"loadInWebView":true,"javaScript":"var KETSU_BASE_URL = \"https://www.wuxiaworld.com\";\nvar USER_AGENT = \"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) ZetsuKetsuModulePack/2026\";\n\nfunction KeyValue(key, value) { this.key = key; this.value = value; }\nfunction ModuleRequest(url, method, headers, httpBody) { this.url = url; this.method = method; this.headers = headers; this.httpBody = httpBody; }\nfunction Extra(commands, extraInfo) { this.commands = commands; this.extraInfo = extraInfo; }\nfunction Commands(commandName, params) { this.commandName = commandName; this.params = params; }\nfunction JavascriptConfig(removeJavascript, loadInWebView, javaScript) { this.removeJavascript = removeJavascript; this.loadInWebView = loadInWebView; this.javaScript = javaScript; }\nfunction MainPage(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Search(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Info(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction Chapters(request, extra, javascriptConfig, output) { this.request = request; this.extra = extra; this.javascriptConfig = javascriptConfig; this.output = output; this.separator = \"\"; }\nfunction PageOutput(cellDesing, orientation, defaultLayout, paging, section, layout, data) { this.cellDesing = cellDesing; this.orientation = orientation; this.defaultLayout = defaultLayout; this.paging = paging; this.section = section; this.layout = layout; this.data = data; }\nfunction Section(sectionName, separator) { this.sectionName = sectionName; this.separator = separator; }\nfunction Layout(insets, visibleCellsWidthS, visibleCellsWidthM, visibleCellsWidthL, visibleCellsHeight, heightForVisibleCells, cellSize, ratio, constant, horizontalSpacing, verticalSpacing) { this.insets = insets; this.visibleCellsWidthS = visibleCellsWidthS; this.visibleCellsWidthM = visibleCellsWidthM; this.visibleCellsWidthL = visibleCellsWidthL; this.visibleCellsHeight = visibleCellsHeight; this.heightForVisibleCells = heightForVisibleCells; this.cellSize = cellSize; this.ratio = ratio; this.constant = constant; this.horizontalSpacing = horizontalSpacing; this.verticalSpacing = verticalSpacing; }\nfunction Insets(top, bottom, left, right) { this.top = top; this.bottom = bottom; this.left = left; this.right = right; }\nfunction Size(width, height) { this.width = width; this.height = height; }\nfunction Ratio(inRelation, number1, number2) { this.inRelation = inRelation; this.number1 = number1; this.number2 = number2; }\nfunction Data(image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4, isChapter, link, openInWebView) { this.image = image; this.title = title; this.description = description; this.field1 = field1; this.field2 = field2; this.field3 = field3; this.field4 = field4; this.isChapter = isChapter; this.link = link; this.openInWebView = openInWebView; }\nfunction InfoOutput(image, link, title, description, genres, field1, field2, field3, field4, chapters) { this.image = image; this.link = link; this.title = title; this.description = description; this.genres = genres; this.field1 = field1; this.field2 = field2; this.field3 = field3; this.field4 = field4; this.chapters = chapters; }\nfunction Chapter(chapName, link, openInWebView) { this.chapName = chapName; this.link = link; this.openInWebView = openInWebView; }\nfunction ChapterOutput(videos, images, text) { this.videos = videos; this.images = images; this.text = text; }\nfunction Videos(needsResolver, rawVideo) { this.needsResolver = needsResolver; this.rawVideo = rawVideo; }\nfunction NeedsResolver(resolverIdentifier, link) { this.resolverIdentifier = resolverIdentifier; this.link = link; }\nfunction RawVideo(video) { this.video = video; }\nfunction Video(videoQuality, videoLink) { this.videoQuality = videoQuality; this.videoLink = videoLink; }\nfunction Text(text) { this.text = text; }\n\nfunction headers(extra) {\n  var list = [new KeyValue(\"User-Agent\", USER_AGENT)];\n  if (KETSU_BASE_URL) list.push(new KeyValue(\"Referer\", KETSU_BASE_URL));\n  if (extra) for (var i = 0; i < extra.length; i++) list.push(extra[i]);\n  return list;\n}\nfunction request(url, method, headerList, body) { return new ModuleRequest(url || \"\", method || \"get\", headerList || headers(), body || null); }\nfunction emptyExtra(extraInfo) { return new Extra([new Commands(\"\", [new KeyValue(\"\", \"\")])], extraInfo || [new KeyValue(\"\", \"\")]); }\nfunction noJs() { return new JavascriptConfig(false, false, \"\"); }\nfunction defaultLayout() { return new Layout(new Insets(8, 8, 8, 8), 2, 2, 3, 1, 540, new Size(300, 540), new Ratio(\"width\", 2, 3), new Size(1, 2), 10, 12); }\nfunction getSaved() {\n  var savedData = document.getElementById(\"ketsu-final-data\");\n  try { return JSON.parse(savedData.innerHTML || savedData.innerText || \"{}\"); } catch (e) { return {}; }\n}\nfunction safeJson(value) {\n  return JSON.stringify(value).replace(/&/g, \"\\\\u0026\").replace(/</g, \"\\\\u003c\").replace(/>/g, \"\\\\u003e\");\n}\nfunction finish(obj) {\n  var savedData = document.getElementById(\"ketsu-final-data\");\n  savedData.innerHTML = safeJson(obj);\n}\nfunction currentUrl() {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  if (state && state.request && state.request.url) return state.request.url;\n  try { return window.location.href; } catch (e) { return KETSU_BASE_URL; }\n}\nfunction readPayload() {\n  var script = document.querySelector(\"script\");\n  var txt = \"\";\n  if (script && script.textContent) {\n    var candidate = script.textContent.trim();\n    if (candidate.indexOf(\"{\") === 0 || candidate.indexOf(\"[\") === 0 || candidate.indexOf(\"/*\") === 0) txt = candidate;\n  }\n  if (!txt && document.body) txt = (document.body.innerText || document.body.textContent || \"\").trim();\n  if (txt.indexOf(\"/*\") === 0) txt = txt.slice(2);\n  if (txt.lastIndexOf(\"*/\") === txt.length - 2) txt = txt.slice(0, -2);\n  return txt.trim();\n}\nfunction parseJsonPayload() { return JSON.parse(readPayload()); }\nfunction docFromHtml(html) { return new DOMParser().parseFromString(html || \"\", \"text/html\"); }\nfunction attr(el, name) { return el ? (el.getAttribute(name) || \"\") : \"\"; }\nfunction text(el) { return cleanText(el ? (el.innerText || el.textContent || \"\") : \"\"); }\nfunction cleanText(value) {\n  return String(value || \"\")\n    .replace(/\\r/g, \"\")\n    .replace(/\\u00a0/g, \" \")\n    .replace(/[ \\t]+\\n/g, \"\\n\")\n    .replace(/\\n[ \\t]+/g, \"\\n\")\n    .replace(/[ \\t]{2,}/g, \" \")\n    .replace(/\\n{3,}/g, \"\\n\\n\")\n    .trim();\n}\nfunction htmlDecode(value) {\n  var ta = document.createElement(\"textarea\");\n  ta.innerHTML = String(value || \"\");\n  return ta.value;\n}\nfunction stripTags(value) {\n  var div = document.createElement(\"div\");\n  div.innerHTML = String(value || \"\");\n  return cleanText(div.textContent || div.innerText || \"\");\n}\nfunction absUrl(url, base) {\n  if (!url) return \"\";\n  try { return new URL(htmlDecode(url), base || currentUrl() || KETSU_BASE_URL).href; }\n  catch (e) {\n    if (String(url).indexOf(\"//\") === 0) return \"https:\" + url;\n    if (String(url).charAt(0) === \"/\") return (base || KETSU_BASE_URL).replace(/\\/$/, \"\") + url;\n    return url;\n  }\n}\nfunction meta(name, doc) {\n  doc = doc || document;\n  var el = doc.querySelector('meta[property=\"' + name + '\"], meta[name=\"' + name + '\"]');\n  return attr(el, \"content\");\n}\nfunction uniquePush(list, seen, key, value) {\n  if (!key || seen[key]) return;\n  seen[key] = true;\n  list.push(value);\n}\nfunction humanizeSlug(value) {\n  value = htmlDecode(String(value || \"\"));\n  value = value.split(/[?#]/)[0].replace(/\\/+$/, \"\");\n  value = value.substring(value.lastIndexOf(\"/\") + 1);\n  value = value.replace(/\\.(html?|json)$/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/^(novel|book|manga|series|comic|comics|chapter|chapters)[-_]/i, \"\");\n  value = value.replace(/[-_]+/g, \" \").replace(/\\b\\w/g, function (m) { return m.toUpperCase(); });\n  return cleanText(value);\n}\nfunction looksIdentifierSegment(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(String(value || \"\"));\n  return !t\n    || /^(manga|novel|book|series|comic|comics|title|chapter|chapters|read|viewer)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)\n    || /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction titleFromLink(link) {\n  try {\n    var url = new URL(absUrl(link), KETSU_BASE_URL);\n    var param = url.searchParams.get(\"title\") || url.searchParams.get(\"page\") || url.searchParams.get(\"name\") || url.searchParams.get(\"keyword\") || url.searchParams.get(\"q\");\n    if (param) return humanizeSlug(param);\n    var bits = url.pathname.split(\"/\").filter(Boolean);\n    for (var i = bits.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n      if (!looksIdentifierSegment(bits[i])) return humanizeSlug(bits[i]);\n    }\n    return humanizeSlug(url.pathname);\n  } catch (e) {\n    return humanizeSlug(link);\n  }\n}\nfunction sourceName() {\n  var host = \"\";\n  try { host = new URL(KETSU_BASE_URL).host.toLowerCase(); } catch (e) { host = String(KETSU_BASE_URL || \"\").toLowerCase(); }\n  var map = [\n    [\"royalroad.com\", \"Royal Road\"],\n    [\"baka-tsuki.org\", \"Baka-Tsuki\"],\n    [\"novelfire.net\", \"NovelFire\"],\n    [\"novelbin.\", \"NovelBin\"],\n    [\"freewebnovel.com\", \"FreeWebNovel\"],\n    [\"readnovelfull.com\", \"ReadNovelFull\"],\n    [\"novgo.net\", \"Novgo\"],\n    [\"novelcool.com\", \"NovelCool\"],\n    [\"scribblehub.com\", \"Scribble Hub\"],\n    [\"wuxiaworld.com\", \"WuxiaWorld\"],\n    [\"mangadex.org\", \"MangaDex\"],\n    [\"asurascans.com\", \"Asura Scans\"],\n    [\"mangakatana.com\", \"MangaKatana\"],\n    [\"mangapill.com\", \"Mangapill\"],\n    [\"weebcentral.com\", \"WeebCentral\"],\n    [\"webtoons.com\", \"WEBTOON\"],\n    [\"tapas.io\", \"Tapas\"],\n    [\"archive.org\", \"Internet Archive\"],\n    [\"wikimedia.org\", \"Wikimedia Commons\"],\n    [\"anilibria.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"aniliberty.\", \"AniLiberty\"],\n    [\"pluto.tv\", \"Pluto TV\"],\n    [\"dailymotion.com\", \"Dailymotion\"],\n    [\"peertube.\", \"PeerTube\"]\n  ];\n  for (var i = 0; i < map.length; i++) if (host.indexOf(map[i][0]) >= 0) return map[i][1];\n  return \"Source\";\n}\nfunction looksGenericTitle(value) {\n  var t = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  if (!t) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9]{4}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}[-/.][0-9]{1,2}$/.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  if (/^(chapter|ch\\.?|episode|ep\\.?|page)\\s*[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?$/i.test(t)) return true;\n  return /^(untitled|series|manga|novel|book|comic|title)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(scribble hub series|mangapill manga|novelfire|novelbin|freewebnovel|readnovelfull|novgo|novelcool|webtoon)$/i.test(t)\n    || /^(royal road|baka-tsuki|mangadex|weebcentral|mangakatana|asura scans)$/i.test(t);\n}\nfunction cleanPageTitle(value, link) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanText(value || \"\");\n  var fallback = titleFromLink(link);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle) && fallback) cleanTitle = fallback;\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+\\|\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanTitle.replace(/\\s+-\\s*(Scribble Hub|NovelFire|NovelBin|Mangapill|MangaDex|WEBTOON).*$/i, \"\");\n  cleanTitle = cleanText(cleanTitle);\n  if (looksGenericTitle(cleanTitle)) cleanTitle = \"\";\n  return cleanTitle || (fallback && !looksGenericTitle(fallback) ? fallback : \"\") || \"Untitled\";\n}\nfunction chapterTitleFromLink(link, fallback) {\n  var raw = cleanText(fallback || \"\");\n  var slug = titleFromLink(link);\n  var source = raw || slug;\n  var m = source.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (!m && slug) m = slug.match(/\\b(?:chapter|ch\\.?)\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?[a-z]?)(.*)$/i);\n  if (m) {\n    var rest = cleanText((m[2] || \"\").replace(/^[-:.\\s]+/, \"\"));\n    rest = rest.replace(/\\s+(Mangapill|NovelFire|Chapter)$/i, \"\");\n    return \"Chapter \" + m[1] + (rest && rest.length <= 70 ? \": \" + rest : \"\");\n  }\n  return raw || slug || \"Chapter\";\n}\nfunction pageData(link, image, title, description, field1, field2, field3, field4) {\n  var cleanTitle = cleanPageTitle(title, link);\n  return new Data(request(absUrl(image)), cleanTitle, description || \"\", sourceName(), \"\", \"\", \"\", false, request(absUrl(link)), false);\n}\nfunction emitPage(kind, data, sectionName) {\n  var output = [new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", false), defaultLayout(), data)];\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(\"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitPageAppend(kind, data, sectionName, nextUrl) {\n  var state = getSaved();\n  var output = state.output || [];\n  if (output.length === 1) {\n    var first = output[0] || {};\n    var firstSection = first.section || {};\n    var firstData = first.data && first.data.length ? first.data[0] : null;\n    var firstLink = firstData && firstData.link ? firstData.link.url : \"\";\n    if (!firstSection.sectionName && firstData && !firstData.title && !firstLink) output = [];\n  }\n  output.push(new PageOutput(\"wide6\", \"vertical\", \"longDoubletsFull\", \"leading\", new Section(sectionName || \"\", true), defaultLayout(), data));\n  var ctor = kind === \"search\" ? Search : MainPage;\n  finish(new ctor(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), output));\n}\nfunction emitInfo(output, nextUrl, extraInfo) { finish(new Info(request(nextUrl || \"\", \"get\"), emptyExtra(extraInfo), noJs(), output)); }\nfunction emitImages(images) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, images, null))); }\nfunction emitRawVideos(rawVideos, needsResolver) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(new Videos(needsResolver || [], rawVideos || []), null, null))); }\nfunction emitTextChapter(value) { finish(new Chapters(request(\"\", \"\"), emptyExtra(), noJs(), new ChapterOutput(null, null, new Text(cleanText(value))))); }\nfunction removeJunk(root) {\n  if (!root) return;\n  var junk = root.querySelectorAll(\"script, style, iframe, ins, .ads, .ad, .advertisement, .nf-ads, nav, form\");\n  for (var i = 0; i < junk.length; i++) junk[i].remove();\n}\n\nfunction wwUtf8Bytes(value) {\n  var s = unescape(encodeURIComponent(String(value || \"\")));\n  var out = [];\n  for (var i = 0; i < s.length; i++) out.push(s.charCodeAt(i) & 255);\n  return out;\n}\nfunction wwVarint(value) {\n  var n = Number(value || 0);\n  if (n < 0) n = 0;\n  var out = [];\n  while (n > 127) {\n    out.push((n & 127) | 128);\n    n = Math.floor(n / 128);\n  }\n  out.push(n);\n  return out;\n}\nfunction wwConcat(a, b) {\n  for (var i = 0; i < b.length; i++) a.push(b[i]);\n  return a;\n}\nfunction wwVarField(no, value) {\n  var out = wwVarint(no * 8);\n  return wwConcat(out, wwVarint(value));\n}\nfunction wwStringField(no, value) {\n  var bytes = wwUtf8Bytes(value);\n  var out = wwVarint(no * 8 + 2);\n  wwConcat(out, wwVarint(bytes.length));\n  return wwConcat(out, bytes);\n}\nfunction wwMessageField(no, bytes) {\n  var out = wwVarint(no * 8 + 2);\n  wwConcat(out, wwVarint(bytes.length));\n  return wwConcat(out, bytes);\n}\nfunction wwFrame(bytes) {\n  var len = bytes.length;\n  var framed = [0, (len >> 24) & 255, (len >> 16) & 255, (len >> 8) & 255, len & 255];\n  wwConcat(framed, bytes);\n  var s = \"\";\n  for (var i = 0; i < framed.length; i++) s += String.fromCharCode(framed[i]);\n  return btoa(s);\n}\nfunction wwGrpcHeaders() {\n  return headers([\n    new KeyValue(\"Content-Type\", \"application/grpc-web-text+proto\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Accept\", \"application/grpc-web-text\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"Origin\", \"https://www.wuxiaworld.com\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"x-grpc-web\", \"1\"),\n    new KeyValue(\"client-version\", \"2.11.01-c17e9a86\")\n  ]);\n}\nfunction wwSearchBody(title, sortType) {\n  var inner = wwStringField(1, title);\n  var msg = [];\n  wwConcat(msg, wwMessageField(1, inner));\n  if (sortType) wwConcat(msg, wwVarField(4, sortType));\n  if (sortType) wwConcat(msg, wwVarField(5, 1));\n  wwConcat(msg, wwVarField(7, 20));\n  return wwFrame(msg);\n}\nfunction wwChapterListBody(novelId) {\n  var msg = wwVarField(1, novelId);\n  wwConcat(msg, wwMessageField(3, wwVarField(1, 1000)));\n  return wwFrame(msg);\n}\nfunction wwReadVar(bin, ref) {\n  var shift = 0;\n  var result = 0;\n  var b = 0;\n  do {\n    b = bin.charCodeAt(ref.i++) & 255;\n    result += (b & 127) * Math.pow(2, shift);\n    shift += 7;\n  } while (b >= 128 && ref.i < bin.length);\n  return result;\n}\nfunction wwUtf8(bin) {\n  try { return decodeURIComponent(escape(bin)); } catch (e) { return bin; }\n}\nfunction wwFields(bin) {\n  var fields = [];\n  var ref = { i: 0 };\n  while (ref.i < bin.length) {\n    var tag = wwReadVar(bin, ref);\n    if (!tag) break;\n    var no = Math.floor(tag / 8);\n    var wt = tag % 8;\n    var value = null;\n    var bytes = \"\";\n    if (wt === 0) {\n      value = wwReadVar(bin, ref);\n    } else if (wt === 2) {\n      var len = wwReadVar(bin, ref);\n      bytes = bin.slice(ref.i, ref.i + len);\n      value = wwUtf8(bytes);\n      ref.i += len;\n    } else if (wt === 5) {\n      ref.i += 4;\n    } else if (wt === 1) {\n      ref.i += 8;\n    } else {\n      break;\n    }\n    fields.push({ no: no, wt: wt, value: value, bytes: bytes });\n  }\n  return fields;\n}\nfunction wwField(fields, no) {\n  for (var i = 0; i < fields.length; i++) if (fields[i].no === no) return fields[i];\n  return null;\n}\nfunction wwFieldValue(fields, no) {\n  var f = wwField(fields, no);\n  return f ? f.value : \"\";\n}\nfunction wwDecodeGrpcText(textValue) {\n  var txt = cleanText(textValue || readPayload()).replace(/\\s+/g, \"\");\n  var bin = \"\";\n  try {\n    bin = atob(txt);\n  } catch (e) {\n    var chunk = \"\";\n    for (var c = 0; c < txt.length; c++) {\n      chunk += txt.charAt(c);\n      if (txt.charAt(c) === \"=\") {\n        while (c + 1 < txt.length && txt.charAt(c + 1) === \"=\") {\n          c++;\n          chunk += txt.charAt(c);\n        }\n        try { bin += atob(chunk); } catch (err) {}\n        chunk = \"\";\n      }\n    }\n    if (chunk) {\n      try { bin += atob(chunk); } catch (err2) {}\n    }\n  }\n  var pos = 0;\n  while (pos + 5 <= bin.length) {\n    var flag = bin.charCodeAt(pos) & 255;\n    var len = ((bin.charCodeAt(pos + 1) & 255) * 16777216) + ((bin.charCodeAt(pos + 2) & 255) * 65536) + ((bin.charCodeAt(pos + 3) & 255) * 256) + (bin.charCodeAt(pos + 4) & 255);\n    var msg = bin.slice(pos + 5, pos + 5 + len);\n    if (flag === 0) return msg;\n    pos += 5 + len;\n  }\n  return \"\";\n}\nfunction wwStringWrapper(bytes) {\n  var fields = wwFields(bytes || \"\");\n  return wwFieldValue(fields, 1) || wwUtf8(bytes || \"\");\n}\nfunction wwExtractReactState() {\n  var html = document.documentElement.innerHTML;\n  var marker = \"window.__REACT_QUERY_STATE__ = \";\n  var start = html.indexOf(marker);\n  if (start < 0) return null;\n  var i = start + marker.length;\n  while (i < html.length && /\\s/.test(html.charAt(i))) i++;\n  var begin = i;\n  var depth = 0;\n  var inString = false;\n  var escapeNext = false;\n  for (; i < html.length; i++) {\n    var ch = html.charAt(i);\n    if (inString) {\n      if (escapeNext) escapeNext = false;\n      else if (ch === \"\\\\\") escapeNext = true;\n      else if (ch === \"\\\"\") inString = false;\n    } else if (ch === \"\\\"\") {\n      inString = true;\n    } else if (ch === \"{\") {\n      depth++;\n    } else if (ch === \"}\") {\n      depth--;\n      if (depth === 0) {\n        try { return JSON.parse(html.slice(begin, i + 1)); } catch (e) { return null; }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  return null;\n}\nfunction wwNovelFromEntry(entry) {\n  if (!entry) return null;\n  if (entry.name && entry.slug) return entry;\n  if (entry.item && entry.item.oneofKind === \"novel\") return entry.item.novel;\n  if (entry.novel) return entry.novel;\n  if (entry.series && entry.series.item) {\n    if (entry.series.item.oneofKind === \"novel\") return entry.series.item.novel;\n    return entry.series.item;\n  }\n  if (entry.innerEntry && entry.innerEntry.card && entry.series) return wwNovelFromEntry(entry.series);\n  return null;\n}\nfunction wwPageDataForNovel(novel) {\n  var title = novel.name || \"WuxiaWorld Novel\";\n  var slug = novel.slug || \"\";\n  var link = \"https://www.wuxiaworld.com/novel/\" + slug;\n  var cover = novel.coverUrl && novel.coverUrl.value ? novel.coverUrl.value : \"\";\n  var synopsis = novel.synopsis && novel.synopsis.value ? stripTags(novel.synopsis.value) : \"\";\n  var genres = novel.genres && novel.genres.length ? novel.genres.join(\", \") : (novel.language && novel.language.value ? novel.language.value : \"WuxiaWorld\");\n  var author = novel.authorName && novel.authorName.value ? novel.authorName.value : (novel.translatorName && novel.translatorName.value ? novel.translatorName.value : \"WuxiaWorld\");\n  var count = novel.chapterInfo && novel.chapterInfo.chapterCount && novel.chapterInfo.chapterCount.value ? (\"Chapters: \" + novel.chapterInfo.chapterCount.value) : \"\";\n  return pageData(link, cover, title, synopsis, genres, author, \"Text\", count);\n}\n\nvar state = wwExtractReactState();\nvar queries = state && state.queries ? state.queries : [];\nvar chapter = null;\nfor (var q = 0; q < queries.length; q++) {\n  if (queries[q].queryKey && queries[q].queryKey[0] === \"chapter\") {\n    chapter = queries[q].state && queries[q].state.data ? queries[q].state.data.item : null;\n  }\n}\nvar title = chapter && chapter.name ? chapter.name : (meta(\"og:title\") || text(document.querySelector(\"h1\")));\ntitle = title.replace(/\\s*\\|\\s*Wuxiaworld.*/i, \"\");\nvar html = chapter && chapter.content && chapter.content.value ? chapter.content.value : \"\";\nvar node = document.querySelector(\".chapter-content\");\nvar body = html ? stripTags(html) : text(node);\nemitTextChapter((title ? title + \"\\n\\n\" : \"\") + body);\n"},"output":{"videos":{"needsResolver":[{"resolverIdentifier":"","link":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null}}],"rawVideo":[{"video":[{"videoQuality":"","videoLink":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null}}]}]},"images":[{"url":"empty","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null}],"text":{"text":""}},"separator":""}],"moduleResolvers":[{"resolverInfo":{"resolverName":"","nameMatches":[""],"developer":"","moduleID":"","resolverVersion":1,"baseURL":""},"resolver":[{"request":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null},"extra":{"commands":[{"commandName":"","params":[{"key":"","value":""}]}],"extraInfo":[{"key":"","value":""}]},"javascriptConfig":{"removeJavascript":false,"loadInWebView":false,"javaScript":""},"output":{"moduleID":"","video":[{"videoQuality":"720","videoLink":{"url":"","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null}}]},"separator":""}]}],"responseCodeFunctions":[{"code":0,"msgTitle":"","msgBody":"","type":"normal","functions":[{"request":{"url":"empty","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null},"extra":{"commands":[{"commandName":"","params":[{"key":"","value":""}]}],"extraInfo":[{"key":"","value":""}]},"javascriptConfig":{"removeJavascript":true,"loadInWebView":false,"javaScript":""},"separator":""}]}],"helperFunctions":[{"functionName":"example","msgTitle":"","msgBody":"","type":"normal","functions":[{"request":{"url":"empty","method":"get","headers":[{"key":"","value":""}],"httpBody":null},"extra":{"commands":[{"commandName":"","params":[{"key":"","value":""}]}],"extraInfo":[{"key":"","value":""}]},"javascriptConfig":{"removeJavascript":true,"loadInWebView":false,"javaScript":""},"separator":""}]}]}
